name: Sencha Supreme
description: Smooth, grassy Japanese green tea with a clean, sweet finish.

name: Jasmine Pearl
description: Hand-rolled green tea leaves scented with fresh jasmine blossoms.

name: Matcha Ceremonial Grade
description: Stone-ground Japanese green tea powder. Vibrant, creamy, and rich in umami.

name: Darjeeling First Flush
description: Light-bodied with muscatel character and floral notes. The Champagne of teas.

name: Earl Grey Classic
description: Bergamot-scented black tea. A timeless classic for every afternoon.

name: English Breakfast
description: Full-bodied, robust blend. Perfect with milk and sugar.

name: Spiced Chai Masala
description: Our house chai blend with cardamom, cinnamon, ginger, and clove.

name: Lavender Lullaby
description: Caffeine-free lavender, chamomile, and lemon balm blend for restful evenings.

name: Peppermint Refresh
description: Pure peppermint leaves. Bright, cooling, and naturally caffeine-free.

name: Silver Needle
description: Pure Fujian white tea buds. Delicate, sweet, and subtly honeyed.

name: Iron Goddess Oolong
description: Traditional Tie Guan Yin with orchid-like aroma and creamy finish.

name: Rooibos Vanilla
description: South African rooibos with natural vanilla. Caffeine-free and naturally sweet.

name: Dragon Well (Longjing)
description: Pan-fired Chinese green tea with chestnut notes and a flat, elegant leaf.

name: Genmaicha
description: Japanese green tea blended with toasted brown rice. Warm and nutty.

name: Lapsang Souchong
description: Pine-smoked black tea from Fujian. Bold, smoky, and unforgettable.

name: Hibiscus Berry
description: Tart hibiscus with elderberry, rosehips, and blackcurrant. Ruby-red and refreshing.
